features.title: Use Item Horizons For Allocation And Deposit Detail
features.scope: Make deposit asset detail follow demand-deposit planning years, and make dashboard asset allocation use each item page horizon such as stock planning years instead of global dashboard years.

features.title: Guard Global Settings During Event Drag
features.scope: Prevent dashboard event dragging from changing global settings, allow dragging only item event time points, and reject drag updates when other events cannot be shifted to valid item time points.

features.title: Make Dashboard Events Draggable And Cap Item Timelines
features.scope: Make dashboard asset-trend events draggable, shift other event timelines when needed to satisfy the dragged event, and cap all item-page planning time controls to the global year count.

features.title: Keep Item Page Calculations Independent
features.scope: Ensure stock, deposit, and house item pages calculate their own assets independently, while dashboard/home overview remains the place that integrates cross-item effects such as house planning cash flow.

features.title: Use Global Codex AGENTS Instead Of Project AGENTS
features.scope: Confirm global C:\Users\User\.codex\AGENTS.md is readable, remove the project-level C:\PlanLab\AGENTS.md override, and restore project state from docs/progress.md and docs/feature_list.json under the global workflow rules.

features.title: Clean Up PlanLab Root After C Drive Relocation
features.scope: Update project naming and documentation for C:\PlanLab, add root AGENTS.md, ignore/remove stale dev-server folders and logs, and verify production build from the new path.

features.title: Fix Global Years Age Labels And Demand Deposit Horizon
features.scope: Rename the global dashboard horizon setting to year count, migrate legacy 10Y homepage defaults to 15Y, add a separate demand-deposit planning horizon, display related year-based labels as ages, and make annual details follow the global year count.

features.title: Tune Allocation Deposit Defaults And Age Axis
features.scope: Merge principal into the stock allocation display, merge cash into demand deposits, enable fixed deposits with a checkbox, show age labels on the dashboard trend X axis, set default current age/homepage years/target amount to 30/15/2000, and remove the monthly return stock KPI.

features.title: Move Stock Principal And Add Global Goal Settings
features.scope: Move initial principal controls from global settings to the stocks page, add global age, dashboard/homepage year, and target amount settings, sync the target amount as an event across dashboard trend and annual details, and keep the dashboard asset trend year independent from the stocks planning year.

features.title: Add Deposit Assets And Fixed Deposit Events
features.scope: Add a deposits item with cash, demand deposit, and fixed deposit balances; apply interest rates to demand and fixed deposits; sync deposit totals, allocation, trend events, and annual details across the app.

features.title: Finish Remaining Judgment-Focused Animations
features.scope: Complete the remaining restrained animation roadmap: landing-to-dashboard transition, shell/page transition polish, slider impact feedback, and annual detail row highlights for house purchase events.

features.title: Add KPI Count-Up And Change Feedback
features.scope: Animate key dashboard, stocks, and house planning KPI values with restrained count-up behavior and brief positive or expense-toned change feedback when financial inputs change.

features.title: Add Judgment-Focused Dashboard Animations
features.scope: Add high-quality but non-distracting animations for dashboard data interpretation: smooth house event trend updates, event tag pulse, doughnut chart count-up and hover/list highlight, and animated house-planning impact reveal.

features.title: Restrict House Event Dragging To Event Tag Hitbox
features.scope: Limit dashboard house event dragging and grab cursor behavior to the visible event tag rectangle so future overlapping events have distinct drag handles.

features.title: Drag Dashboard House Event To Update Purchase Year
features.scope: Make the dashboard asset trend house-purchase event marker draggable so moving it updates the house planning year and recalculates dependent dashboard and house-planning values.

features.title: Visualize House Event And Mortgage Debt On Dashboard
features.scope: When house planning is enabled, show a house-purchase event marker in the dashboard asset trend, surface the event details below the chart, and add a dashboard mortgage debt doughnut chart with remaining and paid mortgage amounts.

features.title: Visualize Stock Invested Cost And Capital Gain
features.scope: Split stock assets into invested cost and capital gain in shared financial plan data, then visualize that breakdown on both the dashboard asset allocation section and the stocks page with quantified doughnut charts and Playwright coverage.

features.title: Add Quantified Dashboard Allocation Doughnut Chart
features.scope: Replace the dashboard asset allocation bar-only display with a Chart.js doughnut chart, central total amount, quantified allocation list, and Playwright coverage that verifies the chart canvas is painted.

features.title: Document PlanLab Features And AI Agent Workflow
features.scope: Update README with the live Vercel viewing URL, PlanLab feature overview, usage instructions, technical stack, and a summary of how the homepage and dashboard were completed with AI agent collaboration.

features.title: Add ProjectionLab-Style Homepage Entry
features.scope: Create a ProjectionLab-inspired PlanLab landing homepage at /, move the current dashboard functionality to /dashboard, and make Start planning enter the existing financial planning app.

features.title: Create Dev Branch Without Vercel Auto Deploy
features.scope: Create and push a dev branch that includes Vercel Git configuration disabling automatic deployments for that branch while preserving main production deployment behavior.

features.title: Allow Numeric Stroke Props For Tabler Icons
features.scope: Fix Vue TypeScript diagnostics for deep-imported Tabler icons when templates pass numeric stroke props such as :stroke="2", and verify the type regression.

features.title: Add Types For Tabler Deep Icon Imports
features.scope: Resolve TypeScript plugin 7016 diagnostics for direct @tabler/icons-vue ESM icon imports while keeping the optimized deep-import approach.

features.title: Fix Home Asset Trend Year Tab And Reload Rendering
features.scope: Make the home asset trend chart period tab follow the planning years configured on the stocks page, prevent arbitrary fixed period choices, persist the year setting through reloads, and verify the trend chart renders after reload.

features.title: ProjectionLab-Style Figma Dashboard Layout
features.scope: Create a PlanLab investment dashboard in the local Nuxt architecture based on the provided HTML and TSX references, including shared financial projection logic, Chart.js asset trend with hover tooltip and quantitative axes, a homepage limited to total assets/trend/allocation, stocks settings and withdrawal planning with stock metrics, settings principal control, house planning with house metrics, annual details, and documented Figma workflow.

features.title: Improve Dark Dashboard Text And Table Contrast
features.scope: Use Playwright-driven browser checks to audit visible text contrast across the local Nuxt dashboard, then improve low-contrast text, table cells, table headers, chart ticks, sidebar badges, and related dark-theme styles.

features.title: Install Playwright MCP For Browser Verification
features.scope: Register @playwright/mcp in the global Codex config so future sessions can use Playwright MCP browser automation for UI verification, including local dashboard contrast and rendering checks.

features.title: Remove Stocks Symbol Table
features.scope: Remove the stocks page symbol table and its unused mock stock data while keeping the stocks KPI cards, investment settings, and contribution/withdrawal planning sections.

features.title: Create ProjectionLab-Style Figma Layout
features.scope: Create a new Figma file with a ProjectionLab-inspired dashboard layout, sidebar shell, desktop frame, and documented design direction.

features.title: Document Figma Layout Workflow As Project Skill
features.scope: Capture the ProjectionLab-inspired Figma layout process in a project-local Codex skill under skills/projectionlab-figma-layout.

features.title: Add Local Layout Shell With Sidebar And Footer
features.scope: Implement the local Nuxt layout framework with a left sidebar, blank main page, footer, and initial sidebar entries for home and stocks.

features.title: Adapt PlanLab HTML UI Into Nuxt
features.scope: Adapt the provided planlab_dashboard_v3.html dashboard style into the Nuxt app shell, home dashboard, stocks page, shared cards, tables, and compact dashboard styling.

features.title: Reorganize Investment TSX Features Into Pages
features.scope: Inspect investment_comparison.tsx, port its financial projection logic into a shared composable, move principal to settings, investment settings and contribution/withdrawal planning to stocks, house planning to house, financial summary and asset trend to home, and annual details to details.

features.title: Refine Home Chart And Move Page Metrics
features.scope: Use Chart.js for the asset trend chart with hover asset tooltip and quantitative X/Y axes, keep the homepage limited to total assets, asset trend, and asset allocation, move stock metrics to stocks, and move house metrics and logic to house.

features.title: Centralize Workflow State Under Docs
features.scope: Update global Codex workflow rules to use docs/feature_list.json, docs/progress.md, docs/specs/<feature-id>.md, and docs/plans/<feature-id>.md as canonical paths, then migrate this project state and existing plan/spec files into those docs locations.

features.title: Match PlanLab UI To HTML Reference Style
features.scope: Refresh the Nuxt dashboard UI to match planlab_dashboard_v3.html, including Tabler icons, compact dashboard colors, shared KPI/card/table/tag styles, reference-like Chart.js styling, period tabs, segmented asset allocation, and consistent page styling.

features.title: Match Main Dashboard Dark Theme From Screenshot
features.scope: Adjust the main dashboard background, topbar, footer, cards, KPI blocks, chart grid/ticks, borders, text colors, and homepage subtitle to match the provided dark screenshot style.
